name: Crockpot Baked Bean and Wiener Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté onion, wiener slices, and garlic in margarine until the onion is tender.
2. Stir in flour and mustard, cooking for 1 minute while stirring constantly until smooth and bubbly.
3. Gradually stir in tomato juice, water, Worcestershire sauce, and baked beans; cook until thickened, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Garnish each serving with shredded cheddar cheese (if desired). You may also add a little A-1 sauce or use V-8 juice instead of tomato juice if preferred.
6. Enjoy!
